audition_requirements.repertoire_summary: Prescreen: One Milde Étude Op. 24; One melodic étude of the applicant's choice; Three to five minute solo of the applicant's choice; A slow, melodic étude of the applicant's choice; Orchestral excerpts: Overture to Mozart's Marriage of Figaro , and the solo from Rimsky-Korsakov's Scheherazade , movement 2; For works that require accompaniment, the Shepherd School will provide a pianist and one hour of rehearsal time. Additional rehearsal time must be arranged and paid for by the applicant. All piano parts must be made available to the Shepherd School pianist three weeks before the scheduled audition date. The applicant must be prepared to perform all chosen works in their entirety. However, the audition committee may decide to hear only certain portions. | Audition: Three to five minute solo of the applicant's choice; One Milde Étude Op. 24; A slow, melodic étude of the applicant's choice; Orchestral excerpts: Overture to Mozart's Marriage of Figaro , and the solo from Rimsky-Korsakov's Scheherazade , movement 2; For works that require accompaniment, the Shepherd School will provide a pianist and one hour of rehearsal time. Additional rehearsal time must be arranged and paid for by the applicant. All piano parts must be made available to the Shepherd School pianist three weeks before the scheduled audition date. The applicant must be prepared to perform all chosen works in their entirety. However, the audition committee may decide to hear only certain portions.

However, the audition committee may decide to hear only certain portions.

audition_requirements.repertoire_summary: Prescreen: Please include the following:; Two concerti; one (1) Haydn and one (1) major Romantic or 20th century, first movement only; Two contrasting movements of Bach; A contemporary unaccompanied work; The repertoire for the audition must include one work from each of the following groups:; Bach - Any of the six Solo Suites (complete) from memory; A concerto (from memory) by Barber; Bloch Schelomo ; Dvorak; Elgar; Hindemith; Prokofiev Op. 125; Schumann; Shostakovich No. 1 or 2; Tchaikovsky Rococo Variations ; or Walton.; A concerto (from memory) by Haydn in D Major or C Major; A sonata by Beethoven or Brahms; A work in a contemporary idiom written within the last seventy-five years. (If longer than 10 minutes, a representative 10-minute portion is sufficient.) Applicants are encouraged to consider choosing a work of a female or other underrepresented minority composer.; One of the following from Group A or B, of not less than 5 minutes in duration, from memory A . A sonata by Locatelli, Francoeur, Boccherini or Valentini. B . A virtuoso work by Sevais or David Popper, or 2 Piatti Caprices.; For works that require piano accompaniment, the Shepherd School will provide a pianist and limited rehearsal time if requested.
